creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 170893
multimedia/qmmp-plugin-pack: Switch version from 0.9.4 to 0.9.5

qmmp-plugin-pack-0.9.5 has been released.  This minor upgraded
version contains bugfix of minimal version check on TagLib using cmake.

eside of this update, in Makefile, declare more dependency information
that the Q/A test claims.
